title: Data Ingestion Workflow for Data Science
description: A flowchart illustrating the common steps and decisions involved in reading data into a Python environment for data science projects.
elements: Identify Data Source (e.g., CSV, Database, API, Parquet)
Choose Appropriate pandas Function (e.g., read_csv, read_sql, read_json)
Set Function Parameters (e.g., file path, delimiter, encoding)
Handle Errors & Data Issues (e.g., missing values, incorrect dtypes)
relationships: Starts with identifying the data source format
Leads to selecting the correct pandas read_* function
Requires configuring parameters for the specific data file
Executes the function to create a DataFrame object
Followed by initial inspection to verify successful load
Final step involves addressing any load errors or data quality problems for analysis readiness
